01 — About

Who I Am

I'm Hariharan S, a B.E. Computer Science & Engineering student with a Data Science specialisation at Sathyabama Institute of Science and Technology, Chennai. I maintain a CGPA of 8.9/10, combining academic excellence with practical project work.

My expertise spans Python, SQL, Tableau, and Power BI — cleaning complex datasets, performing end-to-end exploratory data analysis, and building interactive dashboards that surface actionable business insights.

I've completed virtual experience programmes at Deloitte and TATA (Forage), gaining exposure to real-world enterprise-scale data analytics workflows. I am actively seeking a Data Analyst internship to apply these skills and create business impact.

"Turning raw data into clear decisions — one dashboard at a time."
